'''mozadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oaty|oaty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oaty|oaty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mozadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mozadhithi|mozadhithi]] || [[word:mozadhiji|mozadhiji]] || [[word:mozadhishi|mozadhishi]] || [[word:mozadhiki|mozadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mozadhuthuthu|mozadhuthuthu]] || [[word:mozadhujuju|mozadhujuju]] || [[word:mozadhushushu|mozadhushushu]] || [[word:mozadhukuku|mozadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mozadhuthu|mozadhuthu]] || [[word:mozadhuju|mozadhuju]] || [[word:mozadhushu|mozadhushu]] || [[word:mozadhuku|mozadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mozadhufthuf|mozadhufthuf]] || [[word:mozadhufjuf|mozadhufjuf]] || [[word:mozadhufshuf|mozadhufshuf]] || [[word:mozadhufkuf|mozadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mozadhethe|mozadhethe]] || [[word:mozadheje|mozadheje]] || [[word:mozadheshe|mozadheshe]] || [[word:mozadheke|mozadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mozadhothotho|mozadhothotho]] || [[word:mozadhojojo|mozadhojojo]] || [[word:mozadhoshosho|mozadhoshosho]] || [[word:mozadhokoko|mozadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mozadhotho|mozadhotho]] || [[word:mozadhojo|mozadhojo]] || [[word:mozadhosho|mozadhosho]] || [[word:mozadhoko|mozadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mozadhofthof|mozadhofthof]] || [[word:mozadhofjof|mozadhofjof]] || [[word:mozadhofshof|mozadhofshof]] || [[word:mozadhofkof|mozadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfthĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfjĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfshĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfkĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfthĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfjĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfshĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfkĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfthĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfjĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfshĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mozadhĂŻfkĂŻf|mozadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mozadhĂŠthĂŠ|mozadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mozadhĂŠjĂŠ|mozadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mozadhĂŠshĂŠ|mozadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mozadhĂŠkĂŠ|mozadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mozadhathatha|mozadhathatha]] || [[word:mozadhajaja|mozadhajaja]] || [[word:mozadhashasha|mozadhashasha]] || [[word:mozadhakaka|mozadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mozadhatha|mozadhatha]] || [[word:mozadhaja|mozadhaja]] || [[word:mozadhasha|mozadhasha]] || [[word:mozadhaka|mozadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mozadhafthaf|mozadhafthaf]] || [[word:mozadhafjaf|mozadhafjaf]] || [[word:mozadhafshaf|mozadhafshaf]] || [[word:mozadhafkaf|mozadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mozadhasha|mozadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mozadhshĂ«sha|mozadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mozadhrosha|mozadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mozadhmusha|mozadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mozadhyasha|mozadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomozadhnkshĂ«sha|gomozadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomozadhnkrosha|gomozadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomozadhnkmusha|gomozadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomozadhnkyasha|gomozadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mozazadhasha|mozazadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mozazadhshĂ«sha|mozazadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mozazadhrosha|mozazadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mozazadhmusha|mozazadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mozazadhyasha|mozazadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomozazadhnkshĂ«sha|gomozazadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomozazadhnkrosha|gomozazadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomozazadhnkmusha|gomozazadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomozazadhnkyasha|gomozazadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mezĂŠdhasha|mezĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mezĂŠdhshĂ«sha|mezĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mezĂŠdhrosha|mezĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mezĂŠdhmusha|mezĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mezĂŠdhyasha|mezĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomezĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gomezĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomezĂŠdhnkrosha|gomezĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomezĂŠdhnkmusha|gomezĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomezĂŠdhnkyasha|gomezĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mozfadhasha|mozfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mozfadhshĂ«sha|mozfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mozfadhrosha|mozfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mozfadhmusha|mozfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mozfadhyasha|mozfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomozfadhnkshĂ«sha|gomozfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomozfadhnkrosha|gomozfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomozfadhnkmusha|gomozfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomozfadhnkyasha|gomozfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
